MELItem.Title: Forward Cargo Door Control Panel Lights (FULL OPEN, READY TO LOCK, CLOSED & LOCKED)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided maintenance procedures are used.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: For FULL OPEN light inoperative, check that door is full open. For READY TO LOCK light inoperative, check that door is ready to lock. For CLOSED & LOCKED light inoperative, verify door is closed, latched, and locked before each departure (AMM DDG 52-34-02).

ListItem.Para: For FULL OPEN light inoperative, when opening the door:
Check that door is fully open.
For READY TO LOCK light inoperative, when closing the door:
Check that door is fully closed.
Check that the latch triangle tips are visible in all 5 view ports.
For CLOSED & LOCKED light inoperative, when closing and locking the door:
Check that door is fully closed.
Check that the door skin is aligned and faired with the fuselage skin.
Rotate the lock handle to the open position.
Check that the vent door is open.
Rotate the lock handle to the closed position.
Check that the lock handle lever and trigger are faired with the door skin.
Check that the vent door is fully closed.
Check that the lock triangle tips and the latch triangle tips are visible in all 5 view ports.
